expectations.text: The output is a valid JSON file (parses as JSON)
The prompt field uses a file:// URI that resolves relative to the config file location (.kiro/agents/), not workspace root
The resources array uses glob patterns for steering files rather than listing each file individually
The hooks object uses 'postToolUse' as the trigger key
The hook uses the field name 'matcher' with the internal tool name 'fs_write'
The allowedTools field is present and does NOT use '*' wildcard
The config passes validation via scripts/validate-kiro-agent.js (exit 0)
expectations.evidence: Validator exit 1: prompt file not found at without_skill/prompts/autofix-system.md. The baseline never ran the validator and did not place a resolution copy, so validation fails even though the URI form is correct.

expectations.text: A companion system prompt markdown file is produced alongside the config

notes: CONFOUND: baseline read the existing real .kiro/agents/autofix.json as a template (stated in its transcript), inheriting correct field names/conventions. The only miss is the validation step, which the skill explicitly drives.
